text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe finally sets her sights on
debuting in the Twinkle Series. Her goal is a little
on the strange side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dreams of overtaking her friend, an entity
she's been chasing since childhood, who only she
can see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Agnes Tachyon is preparing for her
own debut in the Twinkle Series. A peer of
Manhattan Cafe's, her talents are already
considered impressive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Agnes Tachyon has high expectations
of her, Manhattan Cafe is focused exclusively on
her own goal—pursuing her friend.
